---
title: "latency_check.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\latency_check.py"
loc: 61
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.45
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 7.96
overall_score: 4.73
---

## Intent
The `latency_check.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on LatencyProfiler, __init__, measure_startup, measure_search, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via LatencyProfiler, __init__, measure_startup, measure_search, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `LatencyProfiler`
- `__init__`
- `measure_startup`
- `measure_search`
- `main`
